ops.title: cc-present trust set: fail-closed design decisions
ops.body: The internal/trust snapshot builder is deliberately all-or-nothing and fail-closed (codex review findings, 2026-07-16): (1) any unparseable TailscaleIP anywhere in `tailscale status --json` fails the whole build — a garbled status is not a trust source; (2) BackendState != Running fails closed even though the JSON retains stale Self/Peer addresses; (3) nodes with empty DNSName and registry targets with an empty host part are excluded from the name join, so a 'user@' entry or nameless peer can never widen trust; (4) every refresh error yields the EMPTY set (never stale-positive), TTL-stamped so a broken environment retries at 30s cadence, not per-request. Don't 'fix' these toward partial acceptance.
